stemHtml: A turboprop aeroplane has suffered an engine failure. The use of bank angle towards the live engine to tilt the lift vector...

options.a: counteracts the roll caused by uneven lift distribution due to the loss of slipstream on the side of the failed engine.
options.b: increases the sideslip-induced side force on the fin, in order to minimise VMC.
options.c: increases the rudder side force, giving more rudder authority to stop the yaw.
options.d: balances the rudder side force, creating a sideways component opposite to the rudder force.
